Gravebinder  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 48
DMG: 31 Dmg Bonus: 162
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +7 STA: +8
Effect: Hungry Earth (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 30
WT: 0.9 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Damage Caps?
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2004 at 2:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783302919
20 posts
Were damage caps changed in recent years? My 23 sk eruidte with a modest STR of 120 can hit for 60-79 with this thing often.

▲ Page top
Mofo looks like a shovel
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2002 at 8:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778423475
5 posts
this thing rocks i have one on my lvl 2SK ogre and i hit from 20 to 40 with it and YES it looks like a shovel and when u swing it it looks like u digging Up the ground :P
▲ Page top
RE: Mofo looks like a shovel
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 5:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248582255
3 posts
Hit for 40 at lvl2?! The word liar comes to mind. Although, I havent played a new toon in quite awhile, did they remove damage caps for 10 and 20??

Hopefully you just missed a number like "lvl2(3)" and arent a tool.
▲ Page top
RE: Mofo looks like a shovel
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 5:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361376302
54 posts
if your weapon's base damage is more than the damage cap, it'll hit for the base damage, but that's all it'll hit for. for a 30+ character, this'll hit for 60 or so, but for a sub-10 char it'll only do 28-30 or so damage.
▲ Page top
lvl of proc?
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2002 at 10:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252162358
74 posts
what lvl does this beast proc?
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2004 at 7:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1702858585426
Scholar
633 posts
Lucy says Level 30 for the Effect.
▲ Page top
Gravebinder
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2001 at 2:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1695600986541
Scholar
63 posts
Have one on the Innoruuk server, looks sweet as a shovel, and does a good deal of dmg, proc normally does a 58-60dd plus roots the undead mob in question, overall, nice weapon, and does bring in the comments as you smack a mob around with a shovel.
▲ Page top
price

# Oct 05 2001 at 1:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764371556
25 posts
from most sources, seems to go for between 14k and 20k.

__DEL__1593361364799
3 posts
Hey what's the going rate on this thing?

▲ Page top
looks cool
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 5:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361364799
3 posts
I have one of these(obvious gift), and Just wanted to let those curious know.
Yes it does look like a shovel when carried.
I've had it for two weeks and I've already gotten
some great compliments or questions about it.
So it not only kicks butt as a wpn, but also as a conversational piece as well.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 04 2001 at 5:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is now magic item.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 01 2001 at 6:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i think undead require a magical item to inflict damage. interesting weapon with really good damage but could be construed as broken
